stemHtml: A pilot working for a CAT Operator has performed 185 duty hours in the last 27 consecutive days. On the 28th day, the Operator’s crewing department calls asking the pilot to operate a flight with a total duty of 8 hours later that same day. What would be the correct decision, according to the EU Regulation on Air Operations?

options.a: NOT operate the flight, since duty shall NOT exceed 100 hours in any 28 consecutive days.
options.b: NOT operate the flight, since duty shall NOT exceed 190 hours in any 28 consecutive days.
options.c: Operate the flight, since duty is limited to 195 hours in any 28 consecutive days.
options.d: Operate the flight, since duty is limited to 200 hours in any 28 consecutive days.
